QUOTATION

Quotation #: QT-2026-0099
Issued: 2026-01-25
Valid Until: 2026-04-25

From: GlobalParts SA
To: MegaCorp Industries

[1] Hardware components
  - Server unit A (qty 10) ............ $4,500.00
  - Server unit B (qty 5) ............. $3,200.00
  - Network switch (qty 8) ........... $1,800.00
[2] Software licenses
  - OS license per server ............. $250.00
  - Monitoring suite (annual) ......... $1,200.00
[3] Services
  - Installation (on-site) ............ $5,000.00
  - Training (3 days) ................. $3,600.00

Subtotal: $19,550.00
Volume discount (10%): -$1,955.00
Tax (20% VAT, EU customer): $3,519.00
TOTAL: $21,114.00 EUR

NOTES:
1. All prices in EUR. Conversion to other currencies is the buyer's responsibility.
2. Volume discount applies only if total quantity exceeds 20 units across all line items.
3. Installation includes 2 days on-site; additional days billed at $1,500/day.
4. Training is non-refundable once scheduled.

Payment terms: 30% on order, 70% on delivery.
Lead time: 6-8 weeks.
